title: Trial Email - Day 0 (Welcome)
htmlSnippet:
Get the most out of Plus

Hi {firstName},

Your 14-day trial of Plus for **{clubName}** is now active! Start using premium features like unlimited teams, automated email summaries, and reduced transaction fees today.


Log in to your account

title: Trial Email - Day 7 (Halfway)
htmlSnippet:
How's your trial going?

Hi {firstName},

You have 7 days left in your free trial for **{clubName}**. Did you know you can earn rewards by referring a friend? Check out the "Refer a friend" section in your account!


Log in to your account

title: Trial Email - Day 10 (Ending Soon)
htmlSnippet:
Only 4 days left!

Hi {firstName},

Your 14-day trial of Plus for **{clubName}** is almost over. To avoid losing access to premium features, head to the Billing tab in your account and upgrade to a paid plan today.


Log in to your account

title: Trial Email - Day 14 (Ended)
htmlSnippet:
You are back on the Free plan

Hi {firstName},

Your 14-day trial for **{clubName}** has ended and you've been moved back to the Free plan. To regain access to Plus features, simply upgrade your account in the Billing tab at any time. Continue with Plus to get the most out of Fees Please!


Log in to your account

title: Onboarding Email - Plus
htmlSnippet:
Welcome to Fees Please Plus!

Hi {firstName},

Your account **{clubName}** is now officially on the Plus plan! Your account has been upgraded and you have full access to all premium features. Start taking advantage of unlimited teams and automated summaries today!


Log in to your account

title: Onboarding Email - Pro
htmlSnippet:
Welcome to Fees Please Pro!

Hi {firstName},

Your account **{clubName}** is now officially on the Pro plan! Your account has been upgraded and you have full access to all premium features. With Pro, you now have access to advanced reporting and deeper insights.


Log in to your account

title: Chat Welcome Email
htmlSnippet:
Support Request Logged

Hi${userName !== "Unknown User" ? ' ' + userName.split(' ')[0] : ''},

Thanks for reaching out. We've successfully logged a ticket with our engineering team.

Your Reference

${issueKey}

Our team will investigate and if they need to respond, you'll receive an email notification directly from our ticketing system.

Cheers,
The Fees Please Team

Fees Please
Less chasing. More playing.

title: Welcome Email (Needs Onboarding)
htmlSnippet:
Let's get your account set up!

Hi {firstName},

Welcome to Fees Please! We want to help you get the most out of {clubName}.

Getting set up only takes a few minutes. If your club uses PlayHQ, the process is incredibly fast. If you're using our standard setup, all you need is your logo, your player list, and your fixtures (a spreadsheet or even just screenshots work perfectly). Best of all, using the core platform is completely free.

Log in now to finish your setup and start managing your teams!


Log in to your account

title: Welcome Email (Onboarded)
htmlSnippet:
You're all set up! Here's what's next.

Hi {firstName},

Welcome to Fees Please! We want to help you get the most out of {clubName}.

Firstly, it's all about tracking money. You can now assign your players to games and track their payments. We highly recommend setting up the Square integration—it provides the best outcome for seamless payments. (Square charges a small transaction fee, but most users find the convenience well worth it).

Managing availability is also key. Head over to the Team Hub to start tracking who can play each week.

Ready to level up?

If you want to manage availability directly via email, pay reduced Square fees, use automated team list generators, highlight your sponsors, and access advanced reporting—you can trial Plus for 14 days with no credit card required.

If you have 2 or more teams to manage, we recommend taking a look at our Pro plan.


Log in to your account
